episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

bits.premise: Being born in 2001 was personally great but historically awful for lower Manhattan.
A classmate's September 11 birthday turns memorial silence into a cupcake delivery parody of the attacks.

lines.text: I'm born in 2001.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was a great year for me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Not so great for lower Manhattan.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: All right.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Growing up in school, we had a kid whose birthday was on the actual 9/11/2001.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So every year we would have that moment of silence at the end of the day, and the class
lines.label: setup

lines.text: would get real quiet.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And then the teacher would break in, "Boys and girls, on this day we must remember that
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Francesca's mom brought cupcakes!"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Oh my gosh, are those chocolate frosted?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Because this is a day I will never forget.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: We actually had a twin in the class too, Francesca.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The teacher would tell us, "Boys and girls,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "I just got word from the office
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "that a second tray of cupcakes has hit our classroom.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: "A second tray of cupcakes has hit our classroom."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It's really crazy 'cause there was another
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 9/11 birthday in our school across the hall from us.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There was another 9/11 birthday.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: A third tray of cupcakes hit over there.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Really crazy, is that classroom--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: - That classroom was Pentagon shaped
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: and there was supposed to be a fourth tray
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but that one fell in the hallway on the way to the class.
lines.label: punchline
